reviews.review_msg: Karrmen is profoundly knowledgeable and generous in her approach to teaching. She met students where they were in terms of prior familiarity with the subject matter (which varied widely) & provided very useful scaffolding and feedback to set students up for success in their assignments. I learned so much, would love to take more classes with her.

Incredibly useful course on colonialism. Writing reflections in class helped me stay on track with reading and challenged me to stay off AI tools. Readings were selected well, transitioned nicely and weaved into each other. Group work was graded very fairly. How Dr krey explains things in class is super easy to follow, helpful - 10/10!

Karrmen was truly one of the best professors I've ever had (CMNS424 / CMNS824). As a graduate student, I was able to expand my knowledge by a landslide on the course topics, mainly because Karrmen made it very accessible to understand. Easy to meet with her, and her advice helps so much with papers and presentations. Be prepped to read + write.
